title: Summary of Peter Kastner's Research on Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA)
author: Peter S. Kastner (AI-assisted summary)
abstract: AI-generated summary of Kastner's SOA research covering key findings on integration/complexity management, business agility, ESB as foundational middleware, vendor landscape, and challenges in governance, security, and ROI realization. Asserts SOA's promise is real but benefits not widely distributed. Traces SOA lineage forward to microservices.
importance_rationale: Secondary source; AI summary of primary Kastner research. Useful for aggregating themes but not a primary data document.
relevance_rationale: Directly synthesizes Kastner's SOA research corpus and articulates key themes: ESB, governance, complexity management, business alignment.
prescience_rationale: Correctly links SOA principles to microservices evolution; Kastner's emphasis on modularity and governance anticipated modern distributed-services patterns.
